subject: Add implementation of stndDefined fields validation
commit_message:
Add implementation of stndDefined fields validation

Added implementation of stndDefined fields from incoming events.
Validation is performed using external-schema-manager tool from DCAE SDK.
StndDefined fields schemas are stored in etc/externalRepo directory.
Additional stndDefined related properties has been added to collector.properties.
VES version has been set to 1.7.3.

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2254
Signed-off-by: Edyta Krukowska <edyta.krukowska@nokia.com>
Signed-off-by: Michal Banka <michal.banka@nokia.com>
Change-Id: Iedaa3622b1d527f6794822c8867b9dfd1860bb8f

Patch Set 11: Code-Review-1

(7 comments)

We received official 3GPP gitLAB repo, where the files are stored.
Please update the locations as recommended in the schema-map file.

Additionally (beyond the schema-map.json updates), we need to:
1. Download the files from this official location and store them, instead the oepnAPI files, which we had before. repo location: https://forge.3gpp.org/rep/sa5/data-models/tree/master/OpenAPI

Make sure, we use the path mentioned in the schema-map, in the local file path.

2. Update the files used in tests.

3.
